choices.text: 3 complexes 120° apart globally: Goldstone CA, Madrid Spain, Canberra Australia. Always one in view of any deep-space mission. 70m + 34m antennas. Receives Voyager 24B km away.

questions.explanation: 3 sites 120° apart for continuous deep-space coverage.

choices.text: 4-24 min light latency each way precludes real-time. Pre-programmed sequences uploaded; rover executes; results downlinked next pass. Mars relay orbiters (MRO, MAVEN, TGO) relay to DSN. Daily plan-execute-review cycle.
